summary: Combat Sense: Characters with the Combat Sense Trait

mechanics.name_guess: Combat Sense: Characters with the Combat Sense Trait
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 111 > npcs > Combat Sense: Characters with the Combat Sense Trait
mechanics.excerpt: Combat Sense: Characters with the Combat Sense Trait roll 3010 and choose the best two dice when rolling Initiative Combat Paralysis: Characters with the Combat Paralysis Trait roll 3010 ad choose the worst two dice when rolling for Initiative_ Tactics: Characters with the Tactics Skill may add their skill bonus to their Initiative score provided the combat situation is appropriate t0 their Tactics knowledge For example character with only Tactics/ BattleMech would gain no bonus to Initiative in combat outside his Mech: Leadershlp: one character with the Leadership Skill is designated the leader of team of characters and he has some way t0 keep in touch with nis team (such as microcom municators).
